tasks.description: Tasks system [1/3] — migration 015_tasks.sql, Task type in database.ts, API routes (GET list by step_id + POST, PATCH, DELETE), client wrapper functions in client.ts. Follows comments system pattern (014_comments.sql, comments/route.ts, comments/[id]/route.ts, client.ts).
acceptance_criteria: Migration 015_tasks.sql creates `tasks` table: id (UUID PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()), workspace_id (UUID NOT NULL FK workspaces ON DELETE CASCADE), step_id (UUID NOT NULL FK steps ON DELETE CASCADE), title (TEXT NOT NULL), is_completed (BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false), position (INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0), assigned_to (UUID nullable FK users ON DELETE SET NULL), created_by (UUID NOT NULL FK users ON DELETE CASCADE), created_at (TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()), updated_at (TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
update_updated_at trigger on tasks table
Indexes: idx_tasks_workspace (workspace_id), idx_tasks_step (step_id), idx_tasks_step_position (step_id, position)
RLS policies on tasks using can_access_workspace(workspace_id) — SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
Task interface exported from src/types/database.ts matching migration columns
GET /api/v1/tasks?workspace_id=X&step_id=Y returns tasks for a step ordered by position ASC
POST /api/v1/tasks creates task — required: workspace_id, step_id, title. Optional: assigned_to. Server sets created_by=user.id, position=max(position)+1 for step
PATCH /api/v1/tasks/[id] updates subset of: title, is_completed, position, assigned_to
DELETE /api/v1/tasks/[id] deletes single task
All routes: auth guard, input validation, PGRST116 → 403 on RLS denial
Client wrappers: fetchTasks(workspaceId, stepId), createTask(data), updateTask(id, data), deleteTask(id)
npx tsc --noEmit passes with 0 errors

patterns_to_follow: Migration: follow 014_comments.sql — CREATE TABLE, update_updated_at trigger, indexes, ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY, four CRUD policies using can_access_workspace()
API GET: auth check → query param extraction → supabase query builder with .eq() filters → .order('position', {ascending: true}) → successResponse(data)
API POST: auth check → body extraction → field validation with early returns → build insert object (set created_by: user.id) → .insert().select().single() → PGRST116 → 403
API PATCH: EDITABLE_FIELDS whitelist → filter body keys → .update(updates).eq('id', id).select().single() → PGRST116 → 404
API DELETE: .delete().eq('id', id).select().single() → PGRST116 → 404 → successResponse({ deleted: true })
Client wrappers: follow comments section in client.ts — apiFetch<T> with URLSearchParams for GET, method+headers+body for mutations
learnings_relevant: apiFetch unwraps envelope — returns T directly, no nested property access
Supabase RLS silent mutations — check if data is null after mutations, return 403

tasks.special_instructions: This is sub-task [1/3] of FEAT-046. ONLY build the data layer — no UI. Do NOT create step-detail-panel changes, canvas node changes, or section rollup. Those are [2/3] and [3/3]. Tasks are step-scoped (direct step_id FK, not polymorphic). step_id FK must use ON DELETE CASCADE (deleting a step removes its tasks). assigned_to FK must use ON DELETE SET NULL (deleting a user doesn't delete tasks). For position auto-assignment in POST: query SELECT COALESCE(MAX(position), -1) + 1 FROM tasks WHERE step_id = $step_id before insert. Migration file must be named exactly 015_tasks.sql. Add Task import to types/index.ts re-exports.

tasks.description: Color picker keyboard accessibility + ARIA in perspective settings — add role='listbox', aria-expanded, arrow key navigation, Escape to close, Enter/Space to select.
acceptance_criteria: Color picker trigger button has aria-expanded={showColorPicker}
Color palette container has role='listbox' and aria-label='Color options'
Each color swatch button has role='option' and aria-selected={color === perspective.color}
Color swatch aria-labels use descriptive names (map hex → name: e.g., '#3B82F6' → 'Blue')
Escape key closes the picker and returns focus to trigger button
Left/Right arrow keys navigate between color options when picker is open
Enter or Space on focused option selects the color and closes picker
Auto-focus first option (or current color) when picker opens
npx tsc --noEmit passes with 0 errors

patterns_to_follow: PERSPECTIVE_COLORS array provides the color list (8 colors)
showColorPicker state + colorRef for outside-click detection already exist
learnings_relevant: Lucide-react no title prop — use aria-label instead (TS2322)

tasks.special_instructions: Attempt 2 — code was built in iter 74 but lost in worktree merge. Not a code quality failure. Scope: ONLY the PerspectiveRow component color picker (lines ~391-417). Add a focusedColorIndex state (useState). When picker opens, set focus to current color index (or 0). Add onKeyDown handler to popup div: ArrowRight increments index (wrap), ArrowLeft decrements (wrap), Enter/Space selects and closes, Escape closes and returns focus to trigger. Use refs array for color buttons to imperatively focus them. Create a COLOR_NAMES map at module scope: { '#3B82F6': 'Blue', '#14B8A6': 'Teal', ... } for descriptive aria-labels. Do NOT refactor surrounding code or touch anything outside PerspectiveRow.

shared_files.note: FEAT-046 [1/3] has exclusive write access to database.ts (add Task type) and client.ts (add task wrappers). IMP-002 only touches settings/page.tsx — zero overlap.
